challenge.title: Korak 2
challenge.description:
Izgleda da i dalje postoje neki problemi sa korišćenjem naslova sekcija na stranici. Gledajući element div, postoje dva elementa od h4 koja se koriste kao podnaslovi. Najbolja praksa je korišćenje elemenata h3 za ove podnaslove jer su na nivou ispod elementa h2.

Promeni dva elementa h4 u elemente h3.

challengeFiles.name: index
challengeFiles.contents:
Welcome to Camperbot's Blog

Navigation

  • My Journey
  • Accessibility
  • Next Steps

My Journey Learning to Code

I started learning to code a few months ago and it's been a wild ride!

Early Challenges

At first, syntax was really confusing.

Breakthroughs

Eventually things started to click.

Accessibility Matters

Today I learned that not everyone uses the web the same way I do.

Screen Readers

These tools help visually impaired users browse websites.

What's Next?

I'm excited to dive into JavaScript and build interactive features!

Coming soon: My first JavaScript project!

Stay tuned for some exciting interactive blog features.

Contact Me

Email me at camperbot@blog.io

tests.text: Vaš element za h4 sa tekstom/sadržajem Early Challenges treba da bude element h3.
Vaš element h4 sa tekstom Breakthroughs treba da bude element h3.
